notes: Iter 10: Use the proper enable_cash_in_regimes for R2 AND R3 — optimizer searches over CASH weight as a free variable in the simplex (4-ticker base/upside/protection panels). R2 + R3 can find their own optimal CASH/XLU/QQQ mix. R1 stays heavy-TQQQ but bounds slightly relaxed (0.6-1.0) to let the optimizer explore. Compared to iter 9 (forced 50/50 CASH+XLU in R2 base, no CASH in R3): iter 10 lets CASH appear in upside/protection too, AND in R3. Hypothesis: optimizer can find a better CASH allocation than my hand-pinned 50/50.
